home.title: ask away
home.sectionStart: Click any of these to get started

explain.title: Explain something
explain.description: Help me understand a topic, a document, a news article, etc.

summarize.title: Summarize
summarize.description: Make a document, article or communication more concise.

write.title: Write for me
write.description: Help me write an email, a letter, a text message, etc.

image.title: Explain an image
image.description: Upload a letter, a receipt, a bill, etc.

health.title: Get health information
health.description: Ask about symptoms, medication, nutrition, etc.

decide.title: Just chat
decide.description: Perfect when you just need a sounding board or supportive ear.

trip.title: Go somewhere
trip.description: Ask about a city visit, an itinerary or a night out.

recipe.title: Find a recipe
recipe.description: Suggestions based on your cravings or ingredients.

tips.1bold: Say it in your own words:
tips.1body: No special language needed, just describe what you're looking for as you naturally would to another person.
tips.2bold: A little context goes a long way:
tips.2body: The more you share about your situation, the more helpful the answer will be.
tips.3body: If the first answer isn't quite right, just say so! You can ask to make it shorter, simpler, or try a different approach.

whatIsIt.title: What is it?
whatIsIt.p1: ask away helps you with everyday tasks and questions. Need to reply to a message? Want to understand a confusing letter? Want to learn about a topic? We can help.
whatIsIt.p2: We use artificial intelligence technology, also called "AI", to write responses for you. But we made it simple. No confusing words. No empty boxes where you have to figure out what to type.

principles.title: Our principles
principles.intro: We built this for people who find artificial intelligence tools confusing and need a little extra guidance.
principles.p1desc: No empty text box staring at you. Pick a situation and we guide you from there.
principles.p2title: Dive deeper, one question at a time
principles.p2desc: We ask simple questions in plain words. No confusing tech talk.
principles.p3desc: The tool is at your service, so nothing happens until you say so.

privacy.title: How we handle your information
privacy.p1: When you share context or paste a message, we only use it to help you get the answer you need. We do not save your conversations or share them with anyone else.
privacy.p2: This is a simple tool. You use it, you get your result, that is it.
